mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate, directly boosting the present value of equity cash flows and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 6.0 percent, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that compress consumer spending and corporate earnings, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the rising unemployment signal.

mechanism_narrative: The joint deterioration of industrial production and housing starts indicates a synchronized collapse in real economic activity and credit demand, which triggers a sharp repricing of equity risk premiums and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The combined index of INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict SPX direction with a Rank IC above 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation readings breach the 215.0 index threshold, the Federal Reserve policy constraint tightens, forcing higher discount rates and compressing equity valuations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive or neutral in more than 50 percent of instances where CPIAUCSL breaches the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery regime, a sustained increase in payroll employment alongside rising real GDP growth signals a broadening economic expansion that supports corporate earnings revisions and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint growth of PAYEMS and GDPC1 fails to produce a positive correlation with SPX 60-day forward returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A persistent upward trend in industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply chain resilience, which reduces input cost volatility and supports higher equity multiples, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO against 5-day forward SPX returns remains below 0.02 across all rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous rise in short-term policy rates and decline in real estate financing availability signals a dual squeeze on liquidity and credit demand, which forces a rapid deleveraging cycle and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term between FEDFUNDS and RSAFS fails to explain more than 5 percent of the variance in 20-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.5 percent, the labor market reaches full employment, triggering wage-push inflation expectations that force the Federal Reserve to hike rates aggressively, ultimately compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns are not significantly negative in the majority of instances where UNRATE breaches the 5.5 percent threshold.
